commands.name: upload

options.name: --expires
options.description:
Expiry date for the SAS URL (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30
days from now.

options.name: --zipped
options.description: Force zip even for single files

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: File or folder path to upload

commands.description:
Upload a file or folder to Azure Blob Storage and get a 
read-only SAS URL
